title: Devon Energy Schedules Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2021 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: OKLAHOMA CITY, Jan. 05, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN) today announced it will report fourth-quarter and full-year 2021 results on Tuesday, Feb. 15, after the close of U.S. financial markets. The earnings release and presentation for the fourth-quarter and full-year 2021 results will be available on the company's website at www.devonenergy.com.
